name: structural-character-clearance
description: Verify an intact wall stays solid while a detached structural block overlapping the character shatters without moving the character.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local intact=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks']:FindFirstChild('DepthBlock_L001_C06_R01') root.CFrame=intact.CFrame root.Anchored=true task.wait(0.45) local intactResult={anchored=intact.Anchored,broken=intact:GetAttribute('Broken'),detached=intact:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached')} root.Anchored=false c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=1,column=6,row=1}) c:Invoke('HitDepthBlock',{layer=1,column=7,row=1}) task.wait(0.35) local target=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks']:FindFirstChild('DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02') root.CFrame=target.CFrame root.Anchored=true local before=root.Position task.wait(0.45) local result={intactAnchored=intactResult.anchored,intactBroken=intactResult.broken,intactDetached=intactResult.detached,broken=target:GetAttribute('Broken'),detached=target:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached'),shatterAt=target:GetAttribute('LastOverlapShatterAt') or 0,drift=(root.Position-before).Magnitude,rootAnchored=root.Anchored} root.Anchored=false return H:JSONEncode(result)

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local root=workspace.PunchWallRPG local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] return H:JSONEncode({broken=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks'].DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02:GetAttribute('Broken'),detached=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks'].DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached'),shatterAt=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks'].DepthBlock_L001_C06_R02:GetAttribute('LastOverlapShatterAt') or 0,drift=0,rootAnchored=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Anchored})

steps.label: detached block shatters without character correction
